hero_title: From my spores to your story
hero_desc:
Each commission is cultivated with care, subtlety, and attention to detail.
From OCs to Vtubers, I craft stories that feel alive.
service_desc1: I bring memorable characters to life with personality and depth for games, stories, or mascots.
service_desc2: Exclusive hand-crafted illustrations for gifts, personal use, or commercial projects.
service_desc3: Bring your character to life. I handle design, illustration, and full motion setup for your avatar.
service_desc4: Enhance your stream with custom emotes tailored for every moment.
